headline: Huntington Ingalls Industries vs. Lockheed Martin: Which Industrial Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Shipbuilding dominance meets aerospace diversification as both companies post robust 2025 financials but differ sharply in risk and valuation.
